title: Kinda Bushy Leaves
description: Gives leaves a nice bit of detail without making it overwhelming.
body:
**Kinda Bushy Leaves** is a lightweight visual enhancement resourcepack that gives leaves a subtle, bushier look without going overboard. It’s designed to blend seamlessly into vanilla gameplay, adding just enough depth and texture to make forests feel more alive, while staying friendly to your FPS.

This mod focuses on **small visual improvements**, not drastic changes, so everything fits right into vanilla.

---

## Features

- Subtly bushy leaf textures
- Vanilla style that fits right into the game
- Pretty minimal performance impact

---

## Performance

Kinda Bushy Leaves is optimized with performance in mind and should run smoothly on most systems, however if there are problems look into recommendations below.

---

## Recommendations

- Enable **Fancy Leaves** in video settings for the intended look
- For greater performance, use optimization mods like [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- General performance mods (Sodium, Lithium, etc.) are fully compatible
  
---
